calendar.matters:
HEARING RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
Off Calendar Jul-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
G Cesswell Templeton, III & William White 213-620-0460 of Hill, Farrer & Burrill LLP appearing via Zoom for plaintiff Hassan Najafi Et Al.
Jamie Dupree 415-399-3840 of Futterman Dupree Dodd Croley Maier LLP appearing via Zoom for defendant Major Chabot Partners LP Et Al.
Reporter: Anita Alderson; CSR# 11843; 714-287-8313; anita.alderson@ccrola.com

Hearing held (See reporter's transcript for full details). Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

HEARING RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

Hearing RE: Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Moving party fails to carry its burden to support the requested relief. The Court finds no basis to enjoin or vacate the arbitration award as sought in this motion for preliminary injunction.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Reported: Anita Alderson; CSR# 11843; 714-287-8313; anita.alderson@ccrola.com (D501)

HEARING RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2023 Continued To Jul-21-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

HEARING RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is continued to July 21 2023 on Court's own motion.

Judge: Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

HEARING RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2023 Continued To Jun-29-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

HEARING RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Continued To Jun-22-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

OSC Re: Preliminary Injunction is continued to June 22, 2023 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply no later than June 2, 2023 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (Opposition received)

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala ; Not Reported. (D501)
